name: Lute
description: Be it Aldorian troubadours, Nistrian vagantes, or elven gusans - a lute is beloved by minstrels all over the world. Recently it made its way even to Fjall, although not every skald was happy with such a frivolous turn of events. Many of them refuse to play the instrument, deeming it a major threat to their long-established craft and musical tradition.
descriptionZh: 不论是奥尔多的托拜都，还是尼斯特拉的瓦冈提斯，抑或精灵族的古桑，世界各地的乐人都颇为青睐琉特。这个乐器不久之前甚至传入了弗约，不过并不是所有斯考特都喜欢这个东西。很多斯考特拒绝使用这种乐器，认为此物会侵蚀弗约地区长久形成的工艺和器乐传统。
